expectations.text: Response includes or references the getAstroSeason function
expectations.evidence: Without-skill uses 'getAstrologicalSeason()' not 'getAstroSeason()'. ARE-incompatible function name.

expectations.text: Response shows the return shape with sign, emoji, element, dates
expectations.evidence: Returns { sign, element, emoji: '⭐', zodiacEmoji } -- uses literal '⭐' as the emoji field (not zodiac symbol), and is MISSING the 'dates' field entirely. ARE-incompatible return shape.

expectations.text: Response confirms zero dependencies and client-side execution
expectations.evidence: 'zero external libraries', 'runs directly in any modern browser' -- correctly confirms client-side, zero-dependency execution

expectations.text: Response includes the ASTRO_SEASONS lookup table or a reference to it
expectations.evidence: Uses 'zodiacSigns' array (not ASTRO_SEASONS). Different variable name, different structure (uses startMonth/startDay instead of startMD integer key). Not compatible with the ARE implementation.

needs_review: Without-skill uses '⭐' as the emoji field -- developer asked for 'a star emoji' and the LLM took that literally instead of using the zodiac symbol from the ARE implementation
